case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. DANIEL VELEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELEZ, DANIEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.99) SERVED OCT-19-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VELEZ, DANIEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,524.38 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT VELEZ, DANIEL
